synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-20935 Important: Oracle Linux 9 squid security update
description:
[7:5.5-22.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-122492 - squid: Squid vulnerable to information disclosure via
  authentication credential leakage in error handling (CVE-2025-62168)

[7:5.5-22]
- Resolves: RHEL-77084 - squid crashes with noteDestinationsEnd check failed
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-20935

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-20935.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
squid-5.5-22.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
squid-5.5-22.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/squid-5.5-22.el9_7.1.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-62168




Description of changes:

[7:5.5-22.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-122492 - squid: Squid vulnerable to information disclosure via
  authentication credential leakage in error handling (CVE-2025-62168)

[7:5.5-22]
- Resolves: RHEL-77084 - squid crashes with noteDestinationsEnd check failed
